creator: rnordier@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The strsignal() function is apparently a GNUism, though arguably one 
worth adopting.  However, the supplied patch attempts to redefine 
sys_siglist[] and to return the mystifying string "Unknown error: xx" 
in certain circumstances. 

If anyone feels strongly about this, perhaps a better set of patches?
